# Analysis — Geo-Strategy #12 (END): Psychohistory (The Science of Imagining the Future)

- **video_id:** `s_k6esWheqA`
- **canonical_url:** https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s_k6esWheqA
- **series / episode:** Predictive History · Geo-Strategy **#12** **of** **12** **(finale;** **YouTube** **title:** **“Geo-Strategy** **END”)**
- **raw_transcript:** [lectures/geo-strategy-12-psychohistory-the-science-of-imagining-the-future.md](../lectures/geo-strategy-12-psychohistory-the-science-of-imagining-the-future.md)
- **upload_date (YouTube):** 20240613
- **analyzed_at:** 2026-03-22 (operator)

## Thesis / aim

Close **the** **year** **with** **hope** **after** **a** **semester** **of** **grim** **geopolitical** **forecasts;** **anchor** **in** **Dante** **—** **future** **as** **imagined/fought,** **not** **merely** **endured.** **Bridge** **Asimov’s** **psychohistory** **(fiction)** **to** **Turchin/cliodynamics** **(elite** **overproduction)** **and** **a** **research** **program:** **supervised** **ML-style** **modeling** **+** **historical** **backtesting** **+** **long-horizon** **validation,** **with** **“Second** **Foundation”** **for** **great-man/edge-case** **corrections** **(telepathy** **metaphor).** **Pedagogical** **blocks:** **what** **AI** **is/isn’t,** **self-driving** **limits,** **EU** **election** **interpretation,** **sociality** **ranking** **examples,** **mass** **society** **critique,** **governance** **(open** **transparent** **democratic** **use).** **Personal** **peroration** **on** **teaching,** **fatherhood,** **and** **staying** **in** **touch.**

## Defined terms (lecture’s usage)

- **Psychohistory** — **Asimov:** **mathematical** **laws** **of** **mass** **behavior** **/** **collapse** **cycles** **(fiction).**  
- **Elite overproduction** — **Turchin:** **too** **many** **elite** **aspirants** **for** **finite** **power** **slots** **→** **internal** **struggle** **→** **collapse** **risk** **(lecture).**  
- **Sociality** — **Lecture’s** **label** **for** **rule-following/cohesion/trust** **(ASR** **“sity/secrity”).**

## Claims (numbered)

1. **Semester** **predictions** **recapped** **(Trump,** **Iran,** **empire,** **multipolarity,** **climate)** **—** **see** **prior** **Geo-Strategy** **archives.**  
2. **EU** **“dead”** **in** **~5** **years** **from** **context** **—** **testable** **forecast** **(see** **jiang-GS12-001).**  
3. **AI** **≈** **supervised** **ML** **only;** **“scam”** **rhetoric** **—** **pedagogical** **provocation** **vs** **2024+** **field** **(see** **div-GS12-001).**  
4. **Self-driving** **unsolvable** **because** **malicious** **human** **edge** **case** **—** **argument** **about** **adversarial** **behavior,** **not** **technical** **literature** **summary.**  
5. **Population** **8** **billion** **→** **1** **billion** **in** **collapse** **transition** **—** **speculative** **(jiang-GS12-002).**  
6. **Second** **Foundation** **/** **telepaths** **/** **Putin** **as** **“almost** **telepath”** **—** **metaphorical** **/** **literary** **layer.**  
7. **Christianity** **co-opted** **by** **Rome** **—** **skeptical** **historical** **aside** **(div-GS12-004).**
